## рЯПЈпЄП Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] `feat` вАФ new feature
- [ ] `fix` вАФ bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` вАФ code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature
- [ ] `style` вАФ formatting only (ktlint, rustfmtвА¶)
- [ ] `docs` вАФ documentation only
- [ ] `test` вАФ adding or updating tests
- [ ] `chore` / `build` / `ci` вАФ tooling, dependencies, configuration

## вЬЕ Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the conventions in `AGENTS.md` and `docs/conventions/`
